title: Patrizia Pepe Zip-up Hoodie — Beige
image_captions: Beige zip-up hoodie with two front pockets and a small logo tag on the bottom right hem.
Beige zip-up hoodie with two front pockets and a small logo tag on the bottom right hem.
Detail shot showing vertical zipper pull reading PATRIZIA PEPE on beige fabric.
Close-up of beige knit garment showing a silver metallic bee-shaped charm attached to a cream-colored woven patch.
Neck tag reading PATRIZIA PEPE. Zipper pull showing PATRIZIA PEPE.
Neck tag reading PATRIZIA PEPE on black fabric. No tape measure, size, or care label visible.
Neck tag reading PATRIZIA PEPE Size 48. Care label showing [X]% [Material] [Y]% [Material]. Back view showing zipper and snap button.
Back view showing beige zip-up hoodie with hood. Zipper pull visible at bottom center hem.
Vertical tape measure showing 70cm at hem edge; horizontal tape measuring width near 82cm. Beige fabric with visible zipper pull on left side.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the garment's edge.

About the Piece
Elevate your everyday look with this classic Patrizia Pepe zip-up hoodie. Crafted in a soft beige knit, it offers a relaxed silhouette perfect for layering or wearing alone. The clean design features subtle branding and premium hardware details that speak to Italian craftsmanship without being overpowering.

Style Note: Minimalist Chic / Modern Casual

Key Detail
Silver metallic bee-shaped charm attached to a cream-colored woven patch; vertical zipper pull reading PATRIZIA PEPE on beige fabric.
